title: dianthus caryophyllus var. tergestinus
intro: Dianthus caryophyllus var. tergestinus, also known as carnation or clove pink, is a fragrant and showy flowering plant belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antiviral, and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for various health issues. The health benefits of Dianthus caryophyllus var. tergestinus include reducing fever, relieving anxiety and depression, and supporting respiratory health, among others. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
